message:
fix(comments): correct output mode priority in add_comment

Fix bug where JSON output was unconditionally printed before checking
the output mode. The previous code called ctx.json_pretty() regardless
of whether JSON mode was requested, then additionally rendered rich or
plain output.

Now the output modes are properly mutually exclusive:
1. If JSON mode: output JSON only
2. Else if rich mode: render rich formatted output
3. Else: print plain text confirmation

This prevents duplicate output when using --json flag with the comments
add subcommand.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
